author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/coordinator/permission.rs: replaced misleading doc comment that claimed QueuedPermission carries a reply channel. New doc explicitly marks it fire-and-forget at Phase 1, documents the no-channel constraint, and lays out both Phase 3 resume options (oneshot field vs parallel correlation map). 2 unit tests (issue_793_*) pin the no-reply contract via Debug introspection + dequeue round-trip — fail loud if a reply/sender/notify field is ever added without updating the doc. All tests pass; clippy --lib --tests exit 0.
